---
title: "LMA en OGM"
author: "GenDoc94"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage[table]{xcolor}
  - \usepackage{longtable}
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)


export_base_LMA <- readRDS("export_base_LMA.rds")

kable(
  export_base_LMA,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  longtable = TRUE
) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("repeat_header", "striped"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
